title: User impersonation via X-User-Id header
summary: Any caller could set X-User-Id to impersonate another user (OWASP A01).

title: SSRF via MCP connection URL
summary: Caller could point MCP client at internal/file URLs (OWASP A10).
mitigation: CreateMcpConnectionRequest @Pattern restricts to http/https valid hostnames (NFR-004).
